title: ITI Jobs 2026 – Trade Apprentices
shortInfo: BDL Recruitment 2026 offers 33 vacancies for Trade Apprentices posts. Eligible candidates with ITI can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BDL website, bdl-india.in.

basic_details.job_title: Bharat Dynamics Limited (BDL) Trade Apprenticeship 2026 Notification OUT, Apply Online for 33 Vacancies @bdl-india.in, Last Date 1st June 2026
basic_details.short_information: BDL Recruitment 2026 offers 33 vacancies for Trade Apprentices posts. Eligible candidates with ITI can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 01-06-2026 through the official BDL website, bdl-india.in.

age_limit.details: For General/Unreserved candidates, the age must be not less than 14 years and not more than 30 years as on 01.06.2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must have passed 10th Class / SSC and hold an ITI certificate (passed) in the relevant trade. The essential qualification is the same for all 8 trades. Important: Engineering Graduates and Diploma holders are NOT eligible to apply for this ITI Apprenticeship. A separate apprenticeship scheme exists for them.

how_to_apply: Visit the Apprenticeship India portal at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/candidate-registration and register as an apprentice candidate.
Search for the establishment - select "Bharat Dynamics Limited, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad (Reg. No. E05203600393)" under "Establishment Search" in Apprenticeship Opportunities.
Fill in your name and date of birth exactly as per your Aadhaar Card, which must also match your 10th/SSC certificate. Correct any discrepancies before the registration deadline.
Upload scanned colour copies (clear and legible) of the following documents on the portal: 10th/SSC mark sheet, ITI provisional mark sheet, and Caste Certificate.
Complete online registration before 1st June 2026.

After completing online registration, send the hard copy of the following by post to reach on or before 8th June 2026: Printout of online registration 10th/SSC mark sheet (hard copy) ITI provisional mark sheet Caste certificate (if applicable)
Printout of online registration
10th/SSC mark sheet (hard copy)
ITI provisional mark sheet
Caste certificate (if applicable)
Address the hard copy to: Manager (HR), Apprentice Cell, Bharat Dynamics Limited, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad – 500058.
BDL employees' wards (children/spouse) must submit their application by hand directly to the Apprentice Cell at the same address after completing portal registration.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online registration on the Apprenticeship India portal is 1st June 2026. The last date to send the hard copy application by post is 8th June 2026. Both steps are mandatory.

faq.question: How many vacancies are there in BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: BDL has released 33 vacancies across 8 trades — Electronics Mechanic (8), Machinist (7), Turner (6), Mechanic R&AC (4), Fitter (3), Machinist Grinder (2), Welder (2), and Mechanic Diesel (1).

faq.question: What is the age limit for BDL Trade Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for General/UR candidates is 14 to 30 years as on 01.06.2026. SC/ST candidates get 5 years relaxation, OBC gets 3 years, and PwBD (UR) gets 10 years relaxation.

faq.question: What is the stipend for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Selected apprentices will receive a stipend as per the rates prescribed under the Apprentices Act, 1961 by the Central Apprenticeship Council. The exact amount is as per current Government of India directives.

faq.question: Is there an application fee for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: No. There is no application fee for BDL Trade Apprenticeship 2026. All candidates can apply free of cost.

faq.question: How is the selection done for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is merit-based only — no written exam or interview. Merit is calculated giving 50% weightage to 10th/SSC marks and 50% to ITI marks. Separate merit lists are made for each trade.

faq.question: What is the training duration for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The training period for all notified trades is one year as per the Apprentices Act, 1961.

faq.question: Can Engineering Graduates or Diploma holders apply for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: No. Engineering Graduates and Diploma holders are not eligible for this ITI Trade Apprenticeship. A separate apprenticeship scheme applies to them.

faq.question: Where do I register for BDL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Register online at https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/candidate-registration. Search for "Bharat Dynamics Limited, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad" with Registration No. E05203600393.

faq.question: Where should I send the BDL Apprenticeship 2026 hard copy?
faq.answer: Send the hard copy by post to: Manager (HR), Apprentice Cell, Bharat Dynamics Limited, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad – 500058, to reach on or before 8th June 2026.

seo_tags: Bharat Dynamics Limited Trade Apprentices Recruitment 2026
